examples: Results 13 of 15 patients were cured but 2 died, one died from recurrent bleeding with multi organ failure, the another from septicemia.
An increase in life-threatening hospital-borne infections (such as gangrene, septicemia, tetanus, etc.) and complications (such as shock) can also be expected.
Ali's body was also badly burnt and there are fears he could die from septicemia in the next few days if not properly treated.
